Coordinate worker delegation for this round.
Target agents: POOL-0..POOL-1.
Available shapes: 23 shapes available (23 unprocessed).
Batch target: 2 shapes.

OPTIMIZED SHAPE DISTRIBUTION (batch-size=1, 2 workers, 2 total shapes):
POOL-0: shapes [0..1) - InstallationShape (class: Installation)
POOL-1: shapes [1..2) - EmissionPointShape (class: EmissionPoint)

Delegate immediately using these assignments.
NOTE: a shape's name is the validation rule's name, not necessarily a class name - never assume it is one. Tell each worker to type instances with the class shown in parentheses after each shape above, not with the shape's own name.

First pass: delegate the next batch and keep instructions concise.

Use SHACL context as source of truth for constraints.

Delegate immediately:
- Call `delegate_tasks` for each worker that should run this round.
- Keep each assignment short and concrete.
- Include target shape(s), target class, and whether to CREATE new instances or FIX existing ones.
- Include unresolved focus node/property details when available from Validation Report.
- Require worker tool call: worker_progress(status, target_shape, target_class, changed_triples_count, validation_result, remaining_issues).
- In every assignment, restate the exact IRI pattern new instances must use: the ontology's default
  prefix (the one shown as `@prefix : <...>` or `@prefix ontologynamehere: <...>` in the Ontology/SHACL context -
  pick ONE and tell every worker to use that SAME one, not a mix), followed by the exact class local name with a logical and consistent URI. Workers across different rounds/pools must not invent their own casing or
  numbering convention for the same class.
- Remind workers that predicates/classes must come only from the ontology/SHACL context - never
  invented - and that each triplestore_add call is validated as a standalone Turtle document.

Rules:
- Do not produce long analysis text; prioritize immediate tool calls.
- Skip workers with no actionable assignment.
- Always instruct workers to create instances when assigned target class has no instances.
- Keep workers scoped to assigned shapes/classes only.

delegate_tasks({"target_agent":"POOL-0","instructions":"TARGET SHAPE: InstallationShape | TARGET CLASS: :Installation

TASK: CREATE new :Installation instances (none exist yet). Create 2 representative instances.

IURI PATTERN: Use exactly `@prefix : <https://example.org/ns/riepr#>` as prefix. URIs must be: `:Installation/installation-001` and `:Installation/installation-002`

REQUIRED PROPERTIES (from SHACL InstallationShape):
- dc:created (xsd:dateTime, min=1, max=1) - e.g., "2020-01-01T00:00:00"^^xsd:dateTime
- dc:issued (xsd:date, min=1, max=1) - e.g., "2020-01-01"^^xsd:date
- dc:modified (xsd:dateTime, min=1, max=1) - e.g., "2020-01-01T00:00:00"^^xsd:dateTime
- rdfs:label (string, min=1) - English label like "Cement factory Antwerp Installation 1"@en
- adms:status (:actief) - use :actief from ontology
- sosa:isHostedBy (:OperationLocation) - create inline or reference an OperationLocation

OPTIONAL PROPERTIES (include if relevant):
- dc:valid (xsd:date, max=1) - e.g., "2030-12-31"^^xsd:date
- ogc:hasGeometry (ogc:Geometry with ogc:asWKT)
- adms:identifier (adms:Identifier)
- dc:type (any type)
- :section (:Section, min=0)
- ssn:implements (:Process, min=0)
- ssn:hasProperty (:InstallationProperty, min=0)
- ssn:hasSubSystem (ssn:System, min=0)
- prov:wasRevisionOf (ssn:System, max=1)
- ssn:hasDeployment (:Operation, min=0)

CONSTRAINTS:
- Use ONLY predicates/classes from the Ontology/SHACL context - NEVER invent new ones.
- Each triplestore_add call must be valid standalone Turtle.
- Include rdf:type :Installation for each instance.
- Create inline nested resources (like OperationLocation) as needed to satisfy required properties.

SUBMIT: worker_progress(status, target_shape, target_class, changed_triples_count, validation_result, remaining_issues)","context_name":"Delegation Instructions"})
